allow: Bash(node -e "const db = require\('better-sqlite3'\)\('amam.db'\); const users = db.prepare\('SELECT id, username, name, role FROM users'\).all\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(users\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const db = require\('better-sqlite3'\)\('amam.db'\); db.prepare\('UPDATE users SET role = ? WHERE username = ?'\).run\('ADMIN', 'vellum'\); const u = db.prepare\('SELECT id, username, role FROM users WHERE username = ?'\).get\('vellum'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(u\)\);")
